channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: nuxt /nuxt | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: the full-stack Vue framework

item.title: ansible /ansible | Python | N/A
item.description: Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems.https://docs.ansible.com.

item.title: nasa /fprime | C++ | N/A
item.description: F´ - A flight software and embedded systems framework

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: anthropics /claude-cookbooks | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

item.title: prisma /prisma | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB

item.title: dotnet /aspnetcore | C# | N/A
item.description: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

item.title: malisper /pgrust | Rust | N/A
item.description: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests

item.title: DayuanJiang /next-ai-draw-io | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.

item.title: vercel /next.js | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: The React Framework

item.title: cypress-io /cypress | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.

item.title: microsoft /PowerToys | C | N/A
item.description: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows

item.title: home-assistant /core | Python | N/A
item.description: 🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.

item.title: actions /checkout | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Action for checking out a repo

item.title: oven-sh /bun | Rust | N/A
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: chriskohlhoff /asio | C++ | N/A
item.description: Asio C++ Library

item.title: wonderwhy-er /DesktopCommanderMCP | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

item.title: openai /plugins | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: OpenAI Plugins

item.title: zeux /meshoptimizer | C++ | N/A
item.description: Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render

item.title: hashicorp /terraform | Go | N/A
item.description: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

item.title: google-labs-code /stitch-skills | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

item.title: davila7 /claude-code-templates | Python | N/A
item.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

item.title: abseil /abseil-cpp | C++ | N/A
item.description: Abseil Common Libraries (C++)

item.title: catchorg /Catch2 | C++ | N/A
item.description: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)
